narrative: BES Cyber System impact rating missing on the secondary control center (CIP-002 categorization incomplete). No baseline configuration documented per CIP-010 R1.1. Unauthorized firmware deployed without change control. ESP rule overly permissive (0.0.0.0 any-any). User authorization for terminated employee not revoked, left active. PSP door propped during shift change observed. Outstanding vulnerability over 35 days unpatched. No cyber incident response plan documented. Recovery plan not tested in 24 months. Personnel risk assessment lapsed 14 months. Removable media uncontrolled (USB drives introduced without scan).
